name: methodology-deep-dive
description: Exhaustive deep dive into endogenic methodology foundations — H1 novelty, H2 biological metaphors, H3 augmentation, H4 encode-before-act, and cross-cutting pattern catalog.

sprints.A: H1 — Novelty verification and scientific grounding
sprints.B: H2 — Biological metaphors as precise mappings

sources.title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
sources.reason: Foundational agentic AI paper — tests H1 novelty claim at AI intersection

sources.title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
sources.reason: Park et al. agent memory/reflection — tests H1 novelty of encode-before-act for agents

sources.title: Context Engineering Survey (2512.05470)
sources.reason: Already in corpus; surveys LLM context management, directly tests H1 novelty

sources.reason: In corpus cache, needs investigation for H1 relevance

sources.title: Turing 1952 — The Chemical Basis of Morphogenesis
sources.reason: Primary source H2: Turing morphogenesis maps to morphogenetic seed concept

sources.title: Maturana & Varela 1980 — Autopoiesis and Cognition
sources.reason: Primary source H2: autopoiesis maps to self-producing endogenic substrate

sources.title: Kauffman 1993 — The Origins of Order
sources.reason: Primary source H2: NK fitness landscapes map to agent fleet coupling patterns

sources.title: Engelbart 1962 — Augmenting Human Intellect: A Conceptual Framework
sources.reason: Primary source H3: augmentive partnership principle direct lineage

sources.title: Bush 1945 — As We May Think (The Atlantic)
sources.reason: Primary source H3: memex vision lineage to augmentive partnership

sources.title: Knuth 1984 — Literate Programming (The Computer Journal)
sources.reason: Primary source H4: literate programming lineage to encode-before-act

sources.title: Nygard 2011 — Documenting Architecture Decisions
sources.reason: Primary source H4: ADR as living documentation encode-before-act pattern

sources.title: Fowler — Architecture Decision Records (martinfowler.com)
sources.reason: Already in corpus — ADR practice reference for H4 encode-before-act lineage

sources.title: Fowler — The Practical Test Pyramid
sources.reason: In corpus — test pyramid as specification doc (H4 BDD/Specification by Example)

sources.title: Martraire 2019 — Living Documentation (Addison-Wesley)
sources.reason: Primary source: Living Glossary pattern in Pattern Catalog; H4 encode-before-act

sources.title: Czarnecki & Eisenecker 2000 — Generative Programming
sources.reason: Primary source: generative programming / feature model in Pattern Catalog
